# Github Issue Triage Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# GitHub Issue Triage — <Repo / Project>

## Triage objective

## Summary

## Priority groups

| Priority | Issues | Rationale | Recommended action |
|---|---|---|---|
| P0 / P1 / P2 / P3 / Unknown |  |  |  |

## Release blockers

## Duplicate / related candidates

## Stale or unclear issues

## Label / milestone recommendations

## Questions for owners
```
